message:
feat(cli): Add models subcommand and semantic search config

Extend CLI with model management and semantic search configuration:

src/cli.rs:
- Add Models command with list/info subcommands
- Add ModelsArgs, ModelsListArgs, ModelsInfoArgs structs
- Add ModelType enum (Embedder, Reranker)
- Add validate_mrl_dims() for MRL dimension validation
- Update --dimensions arg to use value_parser validation
- Improve doc comment for --dimensions (256/512/768/1024)

src/config.rs:
- Add SemanticConfig struct for semantic search settings
- Add model, dimensions, reranker, rerank, daemon, rerank_top fields
- Add environment variable overrides (XF_MODEL, XF_DIMS, XF_RERANKER, XF_DAEMON)
- Default daemon=true, rerank=false, rerank_top=100
- Integrate into main Config struct

This enables:
- Listing available embedding/reranker models
- Configuring default semantic search settings in config.yaml
- Overriding settings via environment variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
